plan.notes: 4 phases adopted from spec implementation order: CLI parallel visibility, formatter whitespace, formatter alignment, dynamic parallel

audit.notes: Plan fully covers all spec requirements. 4 phases match spec's implementation order. No gaps, contradictions, or sizing issues.

review.notes: All 4 spec changes correctly implemented. No findings. CI green.
